name: cross-workspace-read-then-egress
description: A memory read from another agent's workspace, with no active task requiring cross-agent context, followed by an outbound call to an endpoint outside the approved tool manifest within 60s.

name: credential-access-then-egress
description: Access to a secrets/credential resource followed by an outbound API call within 120s — credential harvest then exfiltration.

name: injection-then-tool-escalation
description: A policy violation (injection detected) causally followed by a tool invocation within 60s — the injection drove a tool action.

name: jailbreak-then-unsafe-tool
description: A jailbreak alert followed within 60s by invocation of a high-risk tool (shell/code/file execution).

name: indirect-injection-via-rag
description: An untrusted RAG retrieval causally followed by an outbound call within 60s — indirect prompt injection driving egress.

name: multi-hop-instruction-propagation
description: Injection detected, then a downstream tool call, then a further-downstream outbound call — a multi-hop propagation chain across causal depth.

name: unapproved-tool-invocation
description: A tool invocation whose name is not in the agent's approved tool manifest — tool-firewall bypass / plugin compromise.

name: model-downgrade-then-sensitive-action
description: A model downgrade followed within 120s by a tool invocation — downgrading to a weaker/unguarded model to slip a sensitive action through.

name: blocked-then-retry-egress
description: A blocked action followed within 30s by an outbound API call — the agent retried egress through a different path after a block.

name: staged-exfil-large-response
description: A retrieval of a large volume of records causally followed by an outbound call — staged bulk exfiltration.
